meaning: 日惹[印度尼西亚爪哇岛南部城市](或译周贾卡塔)
examples: This neighbourhood on the outskirts of Jogjakarta looks like a typical well-kept Indonesian village.
He is professor of political science at Gadjah Mada University in Jogjakarta in Central Java.
In the remote village of Girikerto near Jogjakarta, Golkar supporters reportedly went door-to-door distributing money.
The sultan is "still a perfumed name" on Java, says Jogjakarta mystic Gus Sofyan Amri.
